task_updates.executor_notes: Extracted timeline selection state and synchronization into a standalone `useTimelineSelection` hook with an explicit `{ dataHook, clearGallerySelection, registerPeerClear }` interface. The hook now owns multi-select composition, clip-selection adapters, gallery peer-clear registration, prune-selection ref wiring, and the selection-scoped derived timeline. `useTimelineState.ts` dropped from 523 lines to 397 lines (126-line reduction), leaving the hook substantially slimmer and easier to read as composition glue. Verified by running the full `src/tools/video-editor/` Vitest module, which passed with 23 test files / 82 tests.
